MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Pitts Housing partners, LP is present. Represented by Danny River/Tia.
Attorney Andrew Vanslyke for the plaintiff.
Defendants Folole Venture Fae, Deangleo Hudson and Jeremiah Williams are present.
Attorney Ceuang Zhang appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JAN-09-2017 is vacated. (501)
